title: S33R Visual Potions
description: This pack gives every potion effect a custom appearance.
body:
This pack REQUIRES Optifine or another Optifine like mod to work.

Do you find it difficult to discern different potion types without reading it?

This pack gives every potion effect a custom appearance and color codes the bottle caps based on whether they are the default potion, longer duration, or stronger. Brown cap is normal, red cap (red like redstone wow) is lengthened, and yellow cap (yellow like glowstone :o) is strengthened. I also retextured each bottle type along with the honey bottle, dragon's breath, and experience bottle.

Lastly, this pack changes the enchantment glint to a more subtle glow so it's easier to tell the colors apart. The glint is still purple, but if you prefer the OG glint you can go into the pack and delete the enchantment_glint.png file from the assets/minecraft/textures/misc folder. If you use a different enchantment glint resource pack, placing that pack above S33R Visual Potions in the resource pack menu will override the enchantment glint from the S33R pack.

Hope this helps people differentiate potions better, it always bugged me but making it required a property file for literally every single type of potion (I think that's over 100...) so it took a minute.

~ S33R
